tool_args.label: Federal Capital Projects total $8,010 million
tool_args.raw_text: The published list of projects contains capital improvement work in the following amounts for each agency. Long Island Rail Road, $1,375 million dollars; Metro-North Railroad, $1,548 million dollars; MTA Bus, $37 million dollars, New York City Transit, including Staten Island Railway, $5,050 million dollars. The total for the MTA is $8,010 million dollars.

tool_args.label: Capital Lockbox funds available for operations due to COVID-19
tool_args.raw_text: The 2020-2021 New York State Enacted Budget amended Public Authorities Law 553-j, to allow the MTA to use monies in the Capital Lockbox funds in 2020 and 2021 to offset decreases in revenue or increases in operating costs due in whole or in part to the State emergency disaster caused by COVID-19.

payload.claim_text: The 2020-2021 NYS Enacted Budget amended Public Authorities Law 553-j to allow MTA to use Capital Lockbox funds in 2020 and 2021 to offset COVID-19 revenue decreases or operating cost increases.
payload.description: Legislative authorization for MTA to use Capital Lockbox funds for operating expenses during COVID-19
payload.subject: MTA Capital Lockbox
